insight: As you begin your learning journey, remember that every great achievement starts with a single step, and by completing your first session, you'll not only gain valuable knowledge but also lay the foundation for a strong momentum that will carry you through future challenges. By focusing on making progress one session at a time, you can build a streak of consistent learning and start to see improvements in your scores, setting yourself up for long-term success and a sense of accomplishment that comes with it.

recommendation.msg: Schedule a review session before proceeding to new material.
